optparse/Values.name: Values
optparse/Values.description: An object holding parsed argument names and values as attributes. Normally created by calling when calling OptionParser.parse_args(), and can be overridden by a custom subclass passed to the values argument of OptionParser.parse_args() (as described in Parsing arguments).
